verses.text: Jesuh in hih thute a hilh khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah
“Na theihsa uh mah bangin tuzawh ni nih khit ciangin Paisan Pawi hun hong tungta ding hi. Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin Mihing Tapa kipia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin siampi lianpen Kaiafas inn-ah siampi liante leh upate kikhawm uh a
kuama theihlohin Jesuh simmatin a thahtheihna ding uh a vaihawm uh hi
Amaute in, “Buaina lianpi hong omkha thei ding ahih manin hih pawi hun sungin hih kei ni,” a ci uh hi.
Bethany khua-a miphak ahi ngei Simon inn-ah Jesuh a om laitakin
numei khat in a manpha mahmah sathau namtui suangngo thawl a dim khat hong tawi-in Jesuh kiangah hong pai a, Jesuh anne-in a tut laitakin a lu tungah a buaksuk hi
Ahi zongin nungzuite in a muh uh ciangin heh uh a, “Bang hangin hih sathau namtui mawk beisak ahi hiam
Hih sathau kizuak leh sum tampi tak kikhawng ding a, mizawngte huhna-in kipia thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in hih thu phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Hih numei bang nuammawh na hi uh hiam? Kei tungah a kilawm mahmahin amah hong gamta hi
Mizawngte pen note tawh hong omkhawm tawntung ding a, ahi zongin note tawh kei ka hong omkhawm tawntung kei ding hi
Keima tungah hih bangin sathau hong buak ciangin ka luanghawm kivuina dingin a hong bawlbawl ahi hi
Note kiangah a mantaka kong genin-ah: Keima hangin a piangding lungdamna thu a kigenna leitung khempeuhah hih numei kiphawkin a gamtatnate kigengen ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin sawmlenihte sung panin Iskariot' tapa Judas a kici mipa siampi liante kiangah va pai a
“Note' khutsungah amah hong pia leng, note in kei bang tawh hong guai ding na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin ngun peek sawmthum a pia uh hi
Tua huna kipanin amah a lehhek theihna ding hunhoih a zongpah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in A Nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi An Ne

verses.text: Silngo Sawhloh Anlum Pawi a kipat ni-in nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Paisan Pawi annek ding koilai takah hong bawlsak le ung deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “Jerusalem khuasungah va pai un la, tua mipa kiangah, ‘Siapa in, “Ka hun hong naita hi. Na inn-ah ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka hong ne ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi
Nungzuite zong Jesuh gen bangin gamta uh a, Paisan Pawi an ding a bawl uh hi
A nitak ciangin Jesuh leh sawmlenihte an ne dingin a tukhawm uh hi
Amaute anne-in a om laitakun Jesuh in, “Note khat in kei na hong lehhek ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin
amaute dah mahmah uh a, amaute in a banbanin, “Topa aw, kei ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “Ankuang ka sawk khawmpihpa in kei hong lehhek ding hi

Mihing Tapa ahih leh Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhsa mah bangin a si ding ahi hi; ahi zongin Mihing Tapa a lehhekpa in gimna thuakding hi. Tua mipa pen a piang vetlo hi leh ama-a' dingin hoihzaw ding hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh a lehhekpa Judas in, “Topa aw, kei ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Na ci khin hi,” ci-in Jesuh in a dawng hi.
Tua bangin an a nek laitakun, Jesuh in anlum la-in lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnen a, a nungzuite kiangah pia-in, “La un la ne un; hih pen ka pumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin hai la a, lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin amaute tungah pia-in, “Na vekpi-un dawn un
Mi tampite' mawhna a maina dingin a luangkhia, Pasian' thuciamna a kipsak, ka sisan ahi hi
Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Ka Pa' Ukna sungah note tawh leenggahzu thak ka dawnkik ni matengin leenggahzu ka dawnkik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin la khat sa uh a, Oliv Mual tungah a pai uh hi.

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Tuucingpa ka satlum ding a, a tuute kithehthang ding hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin note khempeuh in tu nitakin kei na hong taisanmang khin ding uh hi
Ahi zongin hong kithawh kiksak khit ciangin Galilee gamsung note mai-ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Peter in, “Adang khempeuh in hong taisan zongin ke'n kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Tuzan mahmahin ak a khuan' ma-in kei, thumvei tak na hong nial ding lamtak phawk in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter in, “Nang tawh sihkhawmna ding ciangdong ahi zongin kong nial ngei het kei ding hi,” a ci veve hi. Tua mah bangin nungzui dang khempeuh in zong a ci ciat uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh a nungzuite tawh Gethsemane a kici munah pai-in amaute kiangah, “Hua lamah pai-in thu ka va nget kal sungteng hih lai-ah na om un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Peter leh Zebedi tapate gel tonpih a, dahin a lunggim hun ding a kipan hi
Amaute kiangah, “Ka lungsim dahna hangin ka si dektak hi. Hih lai-ah na om un la hong ngak un,” a cih khit ciangin
tawmkhat pai lai-in leilakah bokin thu ngen a, “Pa aw, ahi thei ding ahih leh hih thuakna ding tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin kei' deihna bang hiloin nangma deihna bang hizaw ta hen,” a ci hi
A nungzui thumte kiangah hong paikik ciangin amaute na ihmu uh hi. Amah in Peter kiangah, “Nai khat sung nangawn hong ngakzolo liang na hi uh hiam
Ze-etna-ah na puk khaklohna dingun thu ngen un. Lungsim in ze-etna nang nuam napi-in pumpi in nangzolo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nihveina va paikikin thu ngen a, “Pa aw, keima thuaklohin ahi theilo ding ahih leh nangma deihna bang hi ta hen,” a ci hi
A nungzuite kiangah hong paikik ciangin, a ihmut uh suaklua mahmah ahih manin na ihmu leuleu uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute kiang panin paikhia kikin, a kibang mahin a thumveina thu a ngen hi
Tua ciangin a nungzuite kiangah hong paikik a, “Ihmu-in tawlnga hithiat lailai na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite' khutsungah Mihing Tapa a kipiak ding hun hong tungta hi
Tho un, pai ta ni. Kei hong lehhek dingpa hong naita hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh a Kilehhekna leh a Kimatna

verses.text: Tua bangin Jesuh in thu a gen laitakin sawmlenihte sung panin Judas hong tung a, siampi liante leh upate in a hong sawl, namsau leh molhtum a tawi mihonpi tawh hong tonkhawm hi
A lehhekpa in mihonte kiangah thu na ma gen a, “Ka nap penpa amah hi ding hi; man un,” ci-in a lim ding a hilhkhol hi
Judas zong Jesuh kiangah hong paipahin, “Topa aw, thupha ngah ta in,” ci-in hopihin limnap mahmah hi
Jesuh in, “Lawm aw, hih dingin na ngim pen hihpak in,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ciangin mihonte in Jesuh manin a lencip uh hi
Jesuh tawh a omkhawm mite khat in a namsau dokin siampi lianpenpa' nasempa a sat leh, a bil a satkhia hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Na namsau a paai-ah siatkik in. Namsau a zangte namsau mah tawh si ding hi
Ka Pa kiangah ngen hi leng, vantung galkapte hon sawm leh hon nih val, thakhat thu-in hong puakpah theihding lamtak theilo na hi hiam
Tua bangin kivaikhak hi zenzen leh Lai Siangtho in tu-a bangin a pian'na ding a gen pen bangci tun'theih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonte kiangah, “Gal leh sa bangin hong ngaihsun a, keimah a man dingin namsau leh molhtum tawh hong kuan na hi uh hiam? Nisimin biakinn sungah thu ka hilh niloh a, ahi zongin kei nong man kei uh hi
Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho sungah kamsangte' thugente a tun'theihna dingin hih bangin a hong gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nungzuite khempeuh in Jesuh nusia-in a taisan uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh a man mite in siampi lianpenpa Kaiafas kiangah hong paipih uh a, tua lai-ah Thukham hilh siate leh upate a kikhawm uh hi
Peter in siampi lianpenpa' inntual ciangdong Jesuh' nung galzuih a, bang thu a piang hiam cih a theihna dingin inntualah palikte kiangah a om hi
Siampi liante leh uliante in Jesuh a thahtheihna dingun zuau teci a pangding mi a zong uh hi
Teci tampi in hong gen hangin thahtheihna ding zuau teci pangding kimulo hi. A tawpna ciangin mi nih in thu hong gen a
“Hih mipa in, ‘Pasian' Biakinn susia-in ni thum sungin ka lamkik thei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a hong ci uh hi
Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa hong dingin, “Hih hong mawhsakna thu tawh kisai-in na gen ding omlo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot hangin
Jesuh pauloin a om hi. Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa in, “Pasian' Tapa, Khrih na hih leh na hihloh nong genna dingin a nungta Pasian' min tawh khauhtakin ka hong sawl hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Nangmah in tua mah na ci khin hi. Ahi zongin note khempeuh kiangah ka hong genin-ah: Vanglianpa' taklamah Mihing Tapa omin meii tungah a hong pai na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa in a puan balkek a, “Pasian' tungah a paukhial zo hi. Bang thudang kisam nawn ahi hiam? A paukhialhna na za uh hi
Note in tu-in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Thahdingin a kilawm hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a maitang cilphih uh a
“Nang Khrih aw, kua in hong beng ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a ci uh hi.
Tua bangin inntualah Peter a tut laitakin siampi lianpenpa' nasem numei khat in ama kiangah, “Nang zong Galilee mi Jesuh tawh a kikhawl na hi hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter in nial a, “Na thugen ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Peter zong inntual pualamah a paikhiat leh numei dang khat mah in mu ahih manin a gei-a omte kiangah, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh tawh hih mipa kikhawl hi,” a ci hi
Peter in zong nialkik a, “Hua mipa ka theih taak leh,” ci-in a kiciam hi
Tuazawh a sawtloin a gei-a omte khat in Peter kiangah, “Na kampau zia uh kibang ahih manin nang zong hua mite tawh a kipawl mah na hi takpi hi,” a ci leuleu hi
Tua ciangin Peter kiciam a, “Hua mipa ka thei kei hi. Zuauthu ka gen taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen!” a ci hi. Tua khitzawh phetin ak hong khuangta hi
Tua ciangin, “Ak a khuan' ma-in kei thumvei na hong nial ding hi,” ci-in Jesuh in a gen thu, Peter in phawkkik ahih manin paikhia-in nakpi takin a kap hi.
